The **2023 Categoría Primera A season** (officially known as the **2023 Liga BetPlay Dimayor season** for sponsorship purposes) was the 76th season of the [Categoría Primera A](/wiki/Categor%C3%ADa_Primera_A "Categoría Primera A"), Colombia's top-flight football league. The season began on 24 January and ended on 13 December 2023.[[1]](#cite_note-Assembly-1)[[2]](#cite_note-Schedule-2)

Two tournaments (Apertura and Finalización) were played in the season, each one of them being an independent championship. In the Torneo Apertura, [Millonarios](/wiki/Millonarios_F.C. "Millonarios F.C.") won their sixteenth league title after defeating [Atlético Nacional](/wiki/Atl%C3%A9tico_Nacional "Atlético Nacional") 3–2 on penalty kicks in the finals after a 1–1 draw on aggregate,[[3]](#cite_note-3) whilst [Junior](/wiki/Atl%C3%A9tico_Junior "Atlético Junior") won their tenth league title in the Torneo Finalización, beating [Independiente Medellín](/wiki/Independiente_Medell%C3%ADn "Independiente Medellín") 5–3 on penalty kicks in the finals after tying 4–4 on aggregate.[[4]](#cite_note-4) [Deportivo Pereira](/wiki/Deportivo_Pereira "Deportivo Pereira") were the defending champions, having won the [2022 Finalización](/wiki/2022_Categor%C3%ADa_Primera_A_season#Torneo_Finalización "2022 Categoría Primera A season") tournament.

## Format

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=2023_Liga_DIMAYOR&action=edit&section=1 "Edit section: Format")]

The competition format for this season was approved by the Extraordinary Assembly of [DIMAYOR](/wiki/Divisi%C3%B3n_Mayor_del_F%C3%BAtbol_Profesional_Colombiano "División Mayor del Fútbol Profesional Colombiano") on 14 December 2022, which decided to keep the same system used in the [previous season](/wiki/2022_Categor%C3%ADa_Primera_A_season#Format "2022 Categoría Primera A season"), with two tournaments (Apertura and Finalización) of three stages each.[[1]](#cite_note-Assembly-1)

20 teams took part in the season, the top 18 teams from the relegation table of the previous season as well as the [2022 Primera B](/wiki/2022_Categor%C3%ADa_Primera_B_season#Grand_Final "2022 Categoría Primera B season") champions [Boyacá Chicó](/wiki/Boyac%C3%A1_Chic%C3%B3_F.C. "Boyacá Chicó F.C.") and the winners of the Primera B [promotion play-off](/wiki/2022_Categor%C3%ADa_Primera_B_season#Promotion_play-off "2022 Categoría Primera B season") [Atlético Huila](/wiki/Atl%C3%A9tico_Huila "Atlético Huila"). Boyacá Chicó were the first team to earn promotion, winning the Primera B title on 21 November 2022 after beating Atlético Huila in the season's Grand Final,[[5]](#cite_note-5) while Atlético Huila themselves ensured promotion to the top flight on 29 November 2022, after winning the promotion play-off against [Deportes Quindío](/wiki/Deportes_Quind%C3%ADo "Deportes Quindío").[[6]](#cite_note-6) The promoted teams replaced [Patriotas](/wiki/Patriotas_Boyac%C3%A1 "Patriotas Boyacá") and [Cortuluá](/wiki/Cortulu%C3%A1 "Cortuluá"), the bottom two teams in the [relegation table](/wiki/2022_Categor%C3%ADa_Primera_A_season#Relegation "2022 Categoría Primera A season") of the 2022 season, who were relegated to Primera B.
